name: @yogyoung-code/ai-brand-kit
description: 梅斯健康 AI Brand Kit · React component package — trust layer + logo system

scripts.build: tsup --no-config --entry.index src/index.ts --entry.tokens src/tokens/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --sourcemap --external react --external react-dom --external react/jsx-runtime --target es2020 --no-splitting --treeshake -d dist && node scripts/copy-css.mjs && node scripts/copy-master-brand.mjs
scripts.dev: tsup --no-config --entry.index src/index.ts --entry.tokens src/tokens/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --sourcemap --external react --external react-dom --external react/jsx-runtime --target es2020 --no-splitting -d dist --watch
scripts.demo: echo 'Open demo/index.html in a browser (after npm run build).'
